name: @databricks/databricks-execute
description: CLI to sync and execute a local file on Databricks (mirrors VS Code extension runFile behavior).

scripts.fix: eslint src --ext ts --fix && prettier src README.md package.json tsconfig.json --write
scripts.test:lint: eslint src --ext ts && prettier src README.md package.json tsconfig.json -c
scripts.test: yarn run test:lint && yarn run test:unit
